title: Sealapack Large Freezer Bags, Resealable & Reuseable Food Storage | Easy to Open & Close - Pack Of 15 Bags (25.4cm x 30cm)
features: AIRTIGHT SEAL FOR FRESHNESS: These freezer bags are designed with an airtight press seal that locks in freshness, making them perfect for preserving food. Whether you're storing leftovers or meal prepping for the week, these food bags ensure your food stays fresh longer.

REUSEABLE & RESEALABLE: Made from strong, durable plastic, these resealable food storage bags can be used over and over again, reducing the need for single-use bags. Ideal for everyday use, whether you’re storing veggies, freezing leftovers, or packing sandwiches.

LARGE 10" x 12" SIZE: The extra-large size of these freezer bags makes them perfect for bulk storage. Use them to freeze large portions of meat or fish, chop and freeze vegetables, or store baked goods to keep them fresh in the fridge freezer.

PERFECT FOR MEAL PREP: Save time and energy by prepping meals in advance. These freezer bags allow you to portion out meals, marinate meats, or freeze pre-chopped veggies, so you can enjoy quick and easy meal prep during the week.

GREAT FOR TRAVEL: These versatile plastic bags also double as travel bags. Use them to store toiletries, snacks, or other essentials when you're on the go. Their durable design ensures they won’t leak or tear, making them perfect for travel.

IDEAL AS FRIDGE ORGANISERS: Keep your fridge and freezer organised with these handy bags. They are perfect for categorising food items, making it easier to find what you need. No more cluttered shelves – just simple, organised storage.

REDUCE FOOD WASTE: By using these resealable freezer bags, you can easily freeze overripe fruit or leftover veggies, turning them into smoothies or soups later on. Reduce waste and save money by keeping food fresher for longer.

MULTI-PURPOSE STORAGE SOLUTION: Beyond food storage, these household essentials are great for storing non-food items like craft supplies, small toys, or even first aid kits. Their sturdy construction means they can handle a variety of uses around the house.

EASY LABELLING: Each bag has a convenient space to write the contents and date, helping you keep track of what’s stored inside. This makes it easy to manage your freezer and avoid forgotten leftovers.

ECO FRIENDLY CHOICE: These reusable plastic bags help you cut down on waste by eliminating the need for single-use bags. Not only are they better for the environment, but they also save you money in the long run by reducing the need to buy disposable food storage options.
description: Product Description Sealapack Reusable Freezer Bags are the ultimate kitchen companion, designed to make food storage and organisation effortless. Measuring 10” x 12”, these versatile plastic bags offer a perfect balance of convenience and durability, whether you're meal prepping for the week or packing snacks for a trip. With their easy-to-open, resealable press-seal design, these fridge freezer bags lock in freshness, keeping your food crisp and delicious for longer. They are an essential for anyone who wants to cut down on food waste while keeping their fridge and freezer organised. Ideal for everyday household essentials, these bags can handle anything from frozen veggies to dry snacks, and even non-food items. Their airtight seal ensures that food stays fresh for longer, whether you're using them to store leftovers, freeze portions of meat, or marinate food ahead of time. The reusable design not only makes them eco-friendly but also cost-effective, giving you the freedom to fill, seal, and reuse again and again. With Sealapack, you can enjoy hassle-free food storage while keeping your kitchen neat & organised. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Manchester
